HealthyBites Products Recipes

Oat & Honey Granola Bar

A wholesome snack packed with whole grains and natural honey.

Nutrition Information

NutrientPer serving (35g)
Calories142 kcal
Total Fat5.2g
Carbohydrates22g
Protein3.1g
Fiber2.8g
Sugar8g
Sodium65mg

Ingredients

Rolled oats, honey, canola oil, brown sugar, almonds, dried cranberries, salt.
